name: Rachel
history: Rachel has recurring relationship problems with her husband Ivan. Work-related stress. Sister Emma often takes a caring role toward Rachel. Father had a successful career and strong work ethic, influencing Rachel's expectations. Recently laid off and currently looking for new employment.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must succeed in my career to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't succeed, I will be a failure and unloved.
coping_strategies: Rachel often compares herself to others and strives for perfection to avoid feelings of inadequacy.
situation: Comparing personal career aspirations to those of the spouse.
auto_thought: I will never be as successful as my father or my husband.
behavior: Rachel tends to withdraw and avoid discussing her career concerns with her husband.
